message:
✨ Add Bob shell as agent provider (#111)

* 🐛 Fix UserManagement card not showing content

Add demo data fallback for console users and user management summary
when API is unavailable or in demo mode. This ensures the card always
displays content instead of appearing empty.

Changes:
- Add getDemoConsoleUsers() function with 4 sample users
- Add getDemoUserManagementSummary() function with realistic stats
- Update useConsoleUsers hook to return demo data in demo mode or on API failure
- Update useUserManagementSummary hook to return demo data in demo mode or on API failure

Fixes issue where UserManagement card content was not visible.

Co-Authored-By: Bob <bob@example.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add Bob shell as agent provider

Add support for Bob CLI (Claude OEM) as an AI agent option:

- Create provider_bob.go with BobProvider implementing AIProvider interface
- Register Bob and ClaudeCode providers in InitializeProviders()
- Add 'bob' and 'anthropic-local' to frontend AgentProvider type
- Add icons for Bob and Claude Code local providers

Bob CLI is auto-detected from PATH or common locations including nvm paths.
Uses: bob "prompt" -o json

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Add user_management to DEMO_DATA_CARDS for demo badge

Ensures the UserManagement card displays the demo badge and yellow
outline when showing demo data, consistent with other demo cards.

Co-Authored-By: Bob <bob@example.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Remove user_management from DEMO_DATA_CARDS

Card now uses real API data when backend is available. Demo badge
will only show when explicitly in demo mode or API unavailable.

Co-Authored-By: Bob <bob@example.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix AI missions agent improvements

- Fix Claude Code CLI invocation (positional prompt, not -p flag value)
- Add conversation history support for context in follow-up messages
- Clean Bob CLI output (remove debug lines, ---output--- markers)
- Keep input focus after sending messages
- Show input box while agent is processing (allow typing ahead)
- Fix typing indicator to show currently selected agent
- Add remark-gfm and remark-breaks for proper markdown rendering
- Add command history (up/down arrow) for mission chat input
- Validate API keys on startup and cache validity
- Fix agent icon display in sidebar and navbar

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Allow non-admin users to view their own user info

Modified ListConsoleUsers to return all users for admins, but only
the current user for non-admins. This allows the UserManagement card
to display real data for all authenticated users, not just admins.

Co-Authored-By: Bob <bob@example.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Improve User Management card privacy and add Kind logo

- Show all console users but blur non-current users for non-admins
- Current user is sorted to top with highlight ring and "(you)" label
- Admins can still see and manage all users clearly
- Add dedupe for cluster dropdown in Kubernetes RBAC tab
- Use official Kind logo (ship in bottle) for kind clusters
- Backend returns all users (frontend handles visibility)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Use deduplicatedClusters across all card components

Updated 33 card components to use deduplicatedClusters instead of
raw clusters from useClusters() hook. This prevents duplicate cluster
entries in dropdowns and lists when multiple kubeconfig contexts
point to the same cluster server.

Components updated:
- ArgoCD cards (Applications, Health, SyncStatus)
- Cluster cards (Comparison, Costs, Focus, Health, Locations, Network, ResourceTree)
- Compute/Storage/Network overview cards
- GPU cards (Overview, UsageTrend, Utilization)
- GitOps cards (Drift, KustomizationStatus, OverlayComparison)
- Helm cards (History, ValuesDiff)
- Klaude missions cards
- Namespace cards (Monitor, Overview, Quotas, RBAC)
- Resource cards (Capacity, Trend)
- And more...

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Make weekly releases full releases instead of pre-releases

Weekly builds are stable releases and should not be marked as pre-releases.
This change:
- Only marks nightly builds as pre-releases
- Includes agent/Homebrew updates in weekly releases (same as patch/minor/major)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ User Management: fetch all users from all clusters with local filtering

Backend:
- Add OpenShift users API endpoint (/api/openshift/users)
- Add 60s timeout for OpenShift user queries
- Add GPU node caching improvements

Frontend:
- Add useAllOpenShiftUsers and useAllK8sServiceAccounts hooks
- Fetch from all clusters in parallel on initial load
- Show cluster badges on all user and service account items
- Dropdowns filter locally instead of triggering API calls
- Add isRefreshing state to prevent layout jumps during refresh
- Only show loading spinner on initial load, preserve data during refresh
- Add Bob agent icon

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Bob <bob@example.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -62,7 +62,8 @@ jobs:
 
           echo "release_type=$RELEASE_TYPE" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
 
-          if [ "$RELEASE_TYPE" = "nightly" ] || [ "$RELEASE_TYPE" = "weekly" ]; then
+          # Only nightly builds are pre-releases; weekly builds are stable releases
+          if [ "$RELEASE_TYPE" = "nightly" ]; then
             echo "is_prerelease=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
           else
             echo "is_prerelease=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
@@ -96,8 +97,8 @@ jobs:
           FORCE_AGENT="${{ github.event.inputs.force_agent_release }}"
           RELEASE_TYPE="${{ steps.type.outputs.release_type }}"
 
-          # For stable releases (patch/minor/major), always include agent
-          if [ "$RELEASE_TYPE" != "nightly" ] && [ "$RELEASE_TYPE" != "weekly" ]; then
+          # For stable releases (weekly/patch/minor/major), always include agent
+          if [ "$RELEASE_TYPE" != "nightly" ]; then
             echo "Stable release - including agent"
             echo "agent_changed=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
             echo "has_changes=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

@@ -272,7 +272,7 @@ func (h *MCPHandlers) GetGPUNodes(c *fiber.Ctx) error {
 			var wg sync.WaitGroup
 			var mu sync.Mutex
 			var allNodes []k8s.GPUNode
-			clusterTimeout := 5 * time.Second
+			clusterTimeout := 30 * time.Second // Increased for large GPU clusters
 
 			for _, cl := range clusters {
 				wg.Add(1)

@@ -271,6 +271,7 @@ func (s *Server) setupRoutes() {
 	api.Delete("/users/:id", rbac.DeleteConsoleUser)
 	api.Get("/users/summary", rbac.GetUserManagementSummary)
 	api.Get("/rbac/users", rbac.ListK8sUsers)
+	api.Get("/openshift/users", rbac.ListOpenShiftUsers)
 	api.Get("/rbac/service-accounts", rbac.ListK8sServiceAccounts)
 	api.Get("/rbac/roles", rbac.ListK8sRoles)
 	api.Get("/rbac/bindings", rbac.ListK8sRoleBindings)
